creator: achriston

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
• Set up the Standard Adult Environment as shown in Chapter 2.
  • Ensure, all devices are running and connected to the Network
  • Ensure, that the TAI-Server application is running on the notebook connected to the ASL-5000
  • Start the device
  • If not already done run all calibrations and tests in the “Preop check”-tab with the correct humidification type
  • Run the last released version of the test case “[STBR] PPL.0001 Ventilation Mode (SIMV) adult automatic FULL” with the ID 98 on Medical Portal: AIT Management.
  • After the test is executed, export the test results and copy them into the Tables of the test-case.
testSectionDTOList.title: Test Preparation

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied PEEP and tidal volume are tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 45 seconds.
  • Stores one measurement of Vti and Vte read from the flow analyser in [VTE_FLOWANALYSER], [VTI_ FLOWANALYSER].

(Scripting)-Block: Calculates VT from the flow analyser and stores it in the variable [VT_FLOWANALYSER].

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates PEEP measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates PEEP measured by the flow-analyser
  • Evaluates the calculated VT in [VT_ FLOWANALYSER]
  • Evaluates Vte measured by the ventilator.

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied rate and inspiration time with TI-philosophy are tested. For each partial test the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 45 seconds.
  • Stores the inspiration time measured by the flow-analyser in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER]

(Scripting)-Block: Multiplies the value in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER] by 1000 and stores it in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates the inspiration time measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the inspiration time in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: Rate and Inspiration Time with TI-Philosophy

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied rate and I:E-ratio is tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block: 

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 45 seconds.
  • Stores one measurement of inspiration time measured by the Flow-Analyser in the variable: [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER].

(Scripting)-Block: Multiplies the value in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER] by a factor of 1000 and stores it in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates the inspiration time measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the inspiration time in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied rate and applied inspiration time with peak flow philosophy is tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 45 seconds.
  • Stores one measurement of inspiration time measured by the Flow-Analyser in the variable: [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER].

(Scripting)-Block: Multiplies the value in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER] by a factor of 1000 and stores it in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates the inspiration time measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the inspiration time in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the minimal applied expiration time is tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL-settings (resistance, compliance, rate, inspiration pressure, etc.) to have a passive or an active lung. 

(Setup)-Block: Sets the ventilator settings.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for a defined time interval for the ventilator to reach steady state.
  • Stores one measurement of the expiration time measured by the Flow-Analyser and the ventilator.

(Scripting)-Block: 

  • Converts the measurement from the Flow-Analyzer from “s” to “ms”,
  • Defines the expected expiration time as the target value.
  • Compares expiration phase time measurement with the target value.
  • Stores this comparison result.

(Evaluation)-Block: 

  • Evaluates the stored result  for the expiration phase time.
  • Evaluates the applied rate using fTotal from the ventilator and breath rate from the Fow-Analyser.

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: TexpMin

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
This test shows that the expiration phase of a mandatory machine-triggered breath can be terminated after 0.2 s. 

  • Passive ASL
  • C6-Rate = 60  b/min => Breath-Time = 1.0 s. C6-Ti-setting = 0.8 s
  • The expected applied expiration phase time = 0.2 s
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin without patient effort (C6-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.8s) => Texp = 0.2s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: FA_TE= FA_TE_2 if FA_TE > FA_TE_2 else FA_TE
V_TE= V_TE_2 if V_TE > V_TE_2 else V_TE
FA_TE_OK = TE_EXPECTED - TOLERANCE <= FA_TE and FA_TE <= TE_EXPECTED + TOLERANCE
V_TE_OK = TE_EXPECTED - TOLERANCE <= V_TE and V_TE <= TE_EXPECTED + TOLERANCE

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
All patient breaths are detected. This shows that the expiration phase of a spontaneous patient-triggered breath can be terminated after 0.2 s. 

  • ASL-Rate = 120 b/min => ASL-Breath-Time = 0.5 s
  • Expected TexpMin = 0.2 s
  • Desired inspiration phase time to detect every ASL-breath is equal to ASL-Breath-Time - Expected TexpMin = 0.3 s
  • C6-ETS = 80% allows that the applied inspiration phase time of a spontaneous patient-triggered breath is TinspMin + 10 ms = min(Tinsp, 0.5 s) + 10 ms. Therefore, C6-Ti-setting must be 0.29 s
  • C6-Rate = 1 b/min to avoid mandatory machine-triggered breaths.
  • The expected applied expiration phase time is 0.2 s.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin with patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.29s) => Texp = 0.2s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: FA_TE= FA_TE_2 if FA_TE > FA_TE_2 else FA_TE
V_TE= V_TE_2 if V_TE > V_TE_2 else V_TE
FA_TE_OK = TE_EXPECTED - TOLERANCE <= FA_TE and FA_TE <= TE_EXPECTED + TOLERANCE
V_TE_OK = TE_EXPECTED - TOLERANCE <= V_TE and V_TE <= TE_EXPECTED + TOLERANCE

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Only each 2nd patient effort is detected. This shows that patient efforts inside the TexpMin-window are ineffective.

  • ASL-Rate = 120 b/min => ASL-Breath-Time = 0.5 s
  • Expected TexpMin = 0.2 s
  • Patient efforts can be ineffective if they occurs within the TexpMin-window, e.g. 0.05 s after the end of the applied inspiration phase. The desired inspiration phase time to detect every ASL-breath is equal to ASL-Breath-Time - 0.05 = 0.45 s.
  • C6-ETS = 80% allows that the applied inspiration phase time of a spontaneous patient-triggered breath is TinspMin + 10 ms = min(Tinsp, 0.5 s) + 10 ms. Therefore, C6-Ti-setting must be 0.44 s
  • C6-Rate = 1 b/min to avoid mandatory machine-triggered breaths.
  • Each 2nd patient effort can be detected. Therefore, the expected applied expiration phase time is 0.55 s.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s
................(ASL)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s
................(Setup)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s
................(Exec)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: FA_TE_OK = TE_EXPECTED - TOLERANCE <= FA_TE and FA_TE <= TE_EXPECTED + TOLERANCE
V_TE_OK = TE_EXPECTED - TOLERANCE <= V_TE and V_TE <= TE_EXPECTED + TOLERANCE

testSectionDTOList.title: ................(Scripting)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s
................(Evaluation)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s
................(CleanUp)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 120b/min, Tinsp = 0.44s) => Texp = 0.55s

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied time of the minimal-inspiration state of a ETS-controlled spontaneous breath is tested with Ti = 0.1, Ti = 0.3 and Ti = 0.7. TinspMin is equal to min(0.5, Tinsp).

The sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets the ASL to have appropriate patient breathing. The spontaneous breath should be as short as possible, such that it switches to expiration phase exactly after TinspMin. 

(Setup)-Block:

  • Sets the ventilator settings including ETS = 80 % and Ti = 0.1s, Ti = 0.3s or Ti = 0.7s.
  • Sets the ventilator rate to 1 b/min to avoid that  time-controlled mandatory breaths influence the test.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits 15s.
  • Records the measured inspiration time of two breaths read by the Ventilator and the Flow Analyser.

(Scripting)-Block:

  • Takes the measurement with the lower value.
  • Compares the measurement to the expected value of TinspMin + 10ms
  • Store the result of the comparison

(Evaluation)-Block: Evaluates the result

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: TinspMin
........TinspMin with patient effort ETS = 80% and Tinsp = 0.1s

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman: The expected inspiration time is TinspMin = min(Tinsp, 0.5s) + 10ms

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: FA_TI= FA_TI_2 if FA_TI > FA_TI_2 else FA_TI
V_TI= V_TI_2 if V_TI > V_TI_2 else V_TI
Convert to ms, compute expected TinspMin with given Ti-setting (CS_TI) and comparison with storage of the result.
